_publications._publicationTitle: Gene expression analysis identifies potential biomarkers of neurofibromatosis type 1 including adrenomedullin.

_contextSnippet: NF1-associated MPNST serum-free conditioned medium (8814) stimulated more tube formation than the control serum-free DMEM (P < 0.0001). There was no statistical difference between 8814 serum-free conditioned medium and EGM2
details: NF1-associated MPNST serum-free conditioned medium (8814) stimulated more tube formation than control serum-free DMEM (P < 0.0001); no statistical difference between 8814 conditioned medium and EGM2
